name: notebooklm_retrieve_relevant_chunks
description:
Retrieves relevant source data from a NotebookLM notebook 
based on a query. Use this to query knowledge stored in NotebookLM notebooks.

notebook_id.description:
The NotebookLM notebook ID. Extract this from the NotebookLM URL by 
taking the ID after "https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/". For example, if the 
URL is "https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/abc123", pass "abc123" as the notebook_id.

query.description:
The query to search for relevant content in the notebook. Be 
specific about what information you're looking for.

status_update.description:
A status update to show in the UI that provides more detail on the reason why this function was called.
  
  For example, "Creating random values", "Writing the memo", "Generating videos", "Making music", etc.

source_name.description: The resource name of the source

source_display_name.description: The display name of the source

source_create_time.description: Timestamp when the source was created

text_content.description: The text content from the chunk

media_paths.description: File paths for multimodal content (images, audio) stored in the agent file system

chunks.description: The relevant chunks retrieved from the notebook

name: notebooklm_generate_answer
description:
Generates an answer to a question using a NotebookLM notebook's
    chat functionality. The notebook's AI will synthesize information from its sources
    to provide a comprehensive answer. Use this when you need a direct answer rather
    than raw chunks of content.

notebook_id.description:
The NotebookLM notebook ID. Extract this from the NotebookLM URL by
    taking the ID after "https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/". For example, if the
    URL is "https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/abc123", pass "abc123" as the notebook_id.

query.description:
The question to ask the notebook. Be specific about what
    information you're looking for.

status_update.description:
A status update to show in the UI that provides more detail on the reason why this function was called.
  
  For example, "Creating random values", "Writing the memo", "Generating videos", "Making music", etc.

answer.description: The generated answer in markdown format

name: notebooklm_get_source
description: Gets details and content of a specific source document within a NotebookLM notebook.

notebook_id.description: The NotebookLM notebook ID. Extract this from the NotebookLM URL by taking the ID after "https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/". For example, if the URL is "https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/abc123", pass "abc123" as the notebook_id.

source_id.description: The ID of the source within the notebook.

status_update.description:
A status update to show in the UI that provides more detail on the reason why this function was called.
  
  For example, "Retrieving source document", "Reading file contents", etc.

name.description: The resource name of the source

display_name.description: The display name of the source

original_mime_type.description: The original mime type of the source document

user_drive_source_status.description: The status of user drive source document

user_raw_source.description: Details and contents of the raw source document.

blob_source_content.description: GCS blob details for the source document.

blob_id.description: The unique ID of the source document stored in GCS.

serving_url.description: The temporary serving URL of the source document.

download_url.description: The download URL of the source document.
